modules.title: CSC VLE Training Program
modules.description: Complete training program for Village Level Entrepreneurs covering CSC operations, digital skills, government services, and more.

lessons.title: What is CSC?
lessons.description: CSC is a digital service center that provides government and online services.

lessons.title: History and vision of CSC in India
lessons.description: CSC was started to make villages digitally empowered.

lessons.title: Role of CSC in Digital India Mission
lessons.description: CSC helps deliver Digital India services to rural citizens.

lessons.title: Understanding VLE (Village Level Entrepreneur)
lessons.description: A VLE is a person who runs and manages a CSC center.

lessons.title: Services offered by CSC centers
lessons.description: CSC provides banking, Aadhaar, PAN card, bill payment, and online services.

lessons.title: Impact of CSC in rural development
lessons.description: CSC improves digital access and creates jobs in villages.

lessons.title: Responsibilities of CSC operators
lessons.description: CSC operators help people access digital and government services.

lessons.title: Introduction to CSC Ecosystem Quiz
lessons.description: Test your knowledge on Introduction to CSC Ecosystem

questions.question: What does CSC stand for in the context of Digital India?
What is the primary purpose of a CSC centre?
options: To deliver government and digital services to rural citizens

questions.question: Under which government mission was CSC launched?
What does VLE stand for?
Who is a Sanchalika in the CSC context?
options: A woman entrepreneur who runs a CSC centre
A trainer who teaches digital skills

questions.question: Which is NOT a typical service offered at a CSC centre?
How does a CSC centre contribute to rural development?
options: By bridging the digital divide and bringing services to the doorstep

lessons.title: Infrastructure requirements
lessons.description: CSC needs computers, printers, internet, and biometric devices.

lessons.title: Internet and connectivity setup
lessons.description: A stable internet connection is required for CSC services.

lessons.title: Computer and device setup
lessons.description: Computers and devices are installed and configured for smooth work.

lessons.title: CSC Center Setup & Operations Quiz
lessons.description: Test your knowledge on CSC Center Setup & Operations

questions.question: Which is an essential hardware requirement for a CSC centre?
options: Computer with internet connection and biometric device

questions.question: Why is data backup important at a CSC centre?
options: To prevent loss of important customer and transaction records

questions.question: What should a CSC centre display to meet branding standards?
options: Official CSC logo, service list, and operator name

questions.question: Which practice is part of the daily closing checklist for a CSC centre?
options: Saving and backing up daily transaction records

Ask them to come back later
Hand them a form without speaking

options: Stay calm, listen carefully, empathise, and find a solution

questions.question: What is the correct phone etiquette when receiving a call at the CSC centre?

questions.question: What is the key ethical responsibility of a CSC operator regarding customer data?
options: Share it with other businesses for profit
Keep it confidential and use it only for the purpose it was collected

questions.question: Which is considered unethical behaviour for a CSC operator?
options: Helping a customer fill a form correctly
Charging more than the official service fee without informing the customer
Referring a customer to the correct government office

questions.question: How long should a CSC operator typically retain service records?
options: As per government/UIDAI/CSC guidelines, usually a minimum of 1-5 years

options: Only the number of customers who visited
All services rendered, transactions completed, income collected, and issues faced

questions.question: What is the purpose of an audit at a CSC centre?
options: To verify that records, transactions, and operations comply with rules and are accurate

questions.question: What is an effective way to handle a question you do not know the answer to during training?
options: Ignore the question and move on
Acknowledge it honestly, research the answer, and follow up with the trainee
Make up an answer to appear confident
Tell the trainee it is irrelevant

Including as many topics as possible
